# Sirius GitHub Pages Project

This is a GitHub Pages website for Sirius - a progressive super app with autonomous financial infrastructure and crystalline cryptocurrency technology.

## Project Overview

- **Technology**: Pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript (no build process required)
- **Deployment**: GitHub Pages
- **Purpose**: Landing page for Sirius fintech platform
- **Features**: Interactive animations, investor onboarding, responsive design

## Code Guidelines

- Use modern CSS features (Grid, Flexbox, CSS Variables)
- Maintain accessibility standards
- Optimize for mobile-first responsive design
- Keep JavaScript vanilla (no external dependencies)
- Ensure all animations are performant
- Follow semantic HTML structure

## GitHub Pages Specific

- Main file is `index.html` in root directory
- All assets should be relative paths
- No server-side processing available
- Focus on client-side functionality only
